response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for vocal performances. 2. Identified only instrumental background music throughout the video. 3. Identified a spoken word advertisement for JOYSOUND at the end. 4. Confirmed no vocal songs present.
response.global_summary: This video is a compilation of static screens displaying fan messages of support and anticipation for the 'ReGLOSS 1st Live - Flashpoint' concert, followed by a short promotional advertisement for the JOYSOUND karaoke service. Instrumental background music plays throughout the video.

scenes.description: A series of static screens showing messages of support and anticipation for the ReGLOSS 1st Live - Flashpoint concert. Instrumental BGM is playing throughout.
A promotional advertisement for the JOYSOUND karaoke service featuring a character voiceover and on-screen text. No vocal song is performed.
